plugins.name: brand-studio
plugins.description: Answer three easy questions and get your brand built step by step, window after window — each step reads and writes the same folder. start-here generates a rich set of brand base-documents; then, each in its own window: a marketing email, a polished design system rendered as a real page with exported tokens, a branded carousel locked to those tokens, and a self-contained animated landing page. Nothing to download. Carries no brand of its own; it builds yours.
